title: Interpret Flashing Red On An AGB As Low Battery Requiring Charge
summary: Use the training-video indication meaning to recognize that a flashing red AGB corresponds to battery level under 30% and means the unit needs to charge.
when_to_use: Use when an operator or support user observes an AGB flashing red and needs to interpret the indication based on the training source.
not_for: Do not use this runbook as a full charging or recovery procedure.
Do not use this runbook to infer corrective actions beyond the source-backed meaning that the AGB needs to charge.
Do not use this runbook to diagnose other red indications not explicitly supported by this source segment.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Observe the AGB indication and apply the documented meaning from the training source.

safety_notes: This source only supports interpretation of the indication meaning.
Do not infer additional controls, thresholds, or recovery actions beyond the documented statement.
access_or_tools_needed: Visual access to the AGB status indication
Training source or documented indication meaning

access_required: Ability to visually observe the AGB status indication
system_preconditions: An AGB indication is visible for review

visual_references.description: Training video frame associated with the transcript stating that under 30% the AGB will start flashing red and needs to charge.

steps.title: Observe the AGB indication
steps.purpose: Confirm whether the visible AGB status matches the documented flashing red condition.
steps.instruction: Observe the AGB and identify whether it is flashing red.
steps.expected_result: The user determines whether the AGB is flashing red.
steps.healthy_condition: The indication can be clearly observed and identified.
steps.failure_condition: The indication cannot be clearly seen or the observed state is uncertain.

actions.label: Check AGB light state
actions.exact_action: Observe the AGB and identify whether it is flashing red.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the training frame associated with the transcript about the flashing red low-battery indication.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the indication cannot be clearly observed.
Escalate if a red flashing indication is observed but does not align with the documented source meaning in the current system context.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Transcript: 'under 30% is when the AGB will start flashing red. It needs to charge'

steps.title: Apply the battery threshold meaning
steps.purpose: Use the source-provided threshold tied to the flashing red indication.
steps.instruction: Use the source-provided threshold that flashing red corresponds to battery level under 30%.
steps.expected_result: The flashing red indication is interpreted as battery under 30%.
steps.healthy_condition: The user applies the documented threshold exactly as stated in the source.
steps.failure_condition: The threshold is interpreted differently or unsupported thresholds are added.

actions.label: Interpret threshold
actions.exact_action: Use the source-provided threshold that flashing red corresponds to battery level under 30%.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Reference the training segment tied to the statement that under 30% the AGB will start flashing red.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if you need a threshold other than the source-backed under-30% meaning.
Escalate if the observed flashing red condition appears inconsistent with the documented threshold in the current system context.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Transcript: 'under 30% is when the AGB will start flashing red. It needs to charge'

steps.title: Interpret the condition as needing charge
steps.purpose: Translate the documented indication into the source-backed operational meaning.
steps.instruction: Interpret the flashing red condition as meaning the AGB needs to charge.
steps.expected_result: The user recognizes the flashing red AGB as needing charge.
steps.healthy_condition: The flashing red condition is interpreted as a charging need, consistent with the source.
steps.failure_condition: The condition is interpreted as a different state not supported by the source.

actions.label: Assign charging meaning
actions.exact_action: Interpret the flashing red condition as meaning the AGB needs to charge.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the associated training frame and transcript context for the statement that the AGB needs to charge.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if a red flashing indication is observed but does not align with the documented source meaning in the current system context.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Transcript: 'under 30% is when the AGB will start flashing red. It needs to charge'

steps.title: Record or communicate the interpreted state
steps.purpose: Ensure the observed condition is communicated using only the source-backed meaning.
steps.instruction: Record or communicate the low-battery charging state using only the source-backed meaning.
steps.expected_result: The condition is communicated as flashing red, under 30% battery, and needing charge.
steps.healthy_condition: The communication stays within the source-backed interpretation.
steps.failure_condition: The communication adds unsupported diagnosis, actions, or thresholds.

actions.label: Communicate source-backed state
actions.exact_action: Record or communicate the low-battery charging state using only the source-backed meaning.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if additional corrective actions are being inferred beyond the source statement that it needs to charge.
Escalate if the observed indication does not align with the documented source meaning in the current system context.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Transcript: 'under 30% is when the AGB will start flashing red. It needs to charge'

success_criteria: The user identifies that a flashing red AGB indicates battery below 30%.
The user identifies that the flashing red AGB needs to charge.
Any communication of the condition stays within the source-backed meaning.
healthy_conditions: Flashing red is interpreted as under 30% battery.
The condition is understood as needing charge.
failure_conditions: The AGB indication cannot be clearly observed.
The flashing red indication is interpreted using unsupported thresholds or meanings.
Additional corrective actions are inferred beyond the source-backed statement.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if a red flashing indication is observed but does not align with the documented source meaning in the current system context.
Escalate if the indication cannot be clearly observed or confidently interpreted from the source-backed meaning.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Training segment associated with the statement that under 30% the AGB will start flashing red and needs to charge.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Transcript: 'under 30% is when the AGB will start flashing red. It needs to charge'

missing_details: The source does not provide a full charging procedure.
The source does not provide a required follow-up workflow after identifying the flashing red condition.
The source does not provide role boundaries beyond operator-level interpretation.
The supplied artifact is transcript-adjacent and not a clearly visible image of the flashing red AGB indication itself.
